name: scramble-reveal
title: Scramble Reveal
description: A deterministic hacker-style text reveal that cycles fixed glyph rows and locks the target string from left to right.
evidence: Wave H U27 design research: fixed-seed glyph cycling with authored left-to-right lock frames

variables.label: Text
variables.description: Target string that resolves from deterministic wrong glyphs.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used by the text, prefix, and optional terminal frame.

variables.label: Style
variables.description: Terminal frame or clean text-only presentation.
